brand.name: Access To
brand.mission: Open-source AI tools closing the access gaps that matter most
brand.vision: Every practitioner, advocate, and family can access specialized AI expertise — no code, no cost, no barriers
brand.tagline: AI-powered access to justice, education, housing, health, jobs, safety, and services

slide_deck.description: Presentation slides for conferences, pitches, and workshops

video_script.description: Explainer video script for each pillar (2-3 min)

podcast_outline.description: Podcast episode outline per pillar (20-30 min)

character_persona.description: Character AI persona definition per pillar

social_media.description: Social media copy blocks (Twitter, LinkedIn, etc.)

cross_pillar_stories.name: Survivor's Path
cross_pillar_stories.persona: A domestic violence survivor rebuilding after leaving an unsafe situation
cross_pillar_stories.narrative: Start with a safety plan, connect to healthcare, find stable housing, and access ongoing support services.

cross_pillar_stories.name: Career Builder
cross_pillar_stories.persona: A displaced worker retraining for a new career
cross_pillar_stories.narrative: Align skills to standards, match to WIOA-funded training, navigate benefits during transition, and explore entrepreneurship.

cross_pillar_stories.name: Family Stabilizer
cross_pillar_stories.persona: A single parent securing stable foundations for their family
cross_pillar_stories.narrative: Find affordable housing, enroll in health coverage, connect to social services, and build toward economic self-sufficiency.

cross_pillar_stories.name: Community Anchor
cross_pillar_stories.persona: A local entrepreneur creating jobs in an underserved community
cross_pillar_stories.narrative: Launch a business, create local employment, partner with schools for workforce pipelines, and connect employees to services.
